basic_details.job_title: IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur (IIT Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur (IIT Jodhpur) has released the official Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry and a maximum age of 32 years can apply online until 03 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry with First Class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) in the preceding degree and a good academic record throughout. Minimum two refereed publications as first or corresponding author in SCI journals of international repute. Expertise in photocatalysis and/or electro-organic synthesis with a strong background in synthetic organic chemistry. Experience of computational studies will be considered as well.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jodhpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry with First Class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) in the preceding degree and a good academic record throughout. Minimum two refereed publications as first or corresponding author in SCI journals of international repute. Expertise in photocatalysis and/or electro-organic synthesis with a strong background in synthetic organic chemistry. Experience of computational studies will be considered as well.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Age Limit 2026
IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jodhpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Jodhpur is 03 July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at the Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry with First Class or equivalent, along with a minimum of two refereed publications as the first or corresponding author in SCI journals.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Postdoctoral Fellow position is 32 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Jodhpur Postdoctoral Fellow recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, there is no mention of any application fee for the Postdoctoral Fellow position. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Jodhpur is a temporary role. This means the appointment is for a fixed duration, as is common for research positions.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable qualifications for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include expertise in photocatalysis and/or electro-organic synthesis, a strong background in synthetic organic chemistry, and experience with computational studies.

faq.question: Q9. Which state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for positions located in Rajasthan, specifically at the Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please ensure you click on the correct links provided.
